task_completion.description: Verify the agent has navigated to the Data Archiving settings page in ServiceDesk Plus.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ServiceDesk Plus interface is visible, specifically showing the 'Data Archiving' administration or settings page.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Requests' module is selected for the archiving configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A tab, dropdown menu, or section explicitly labeled 'Requests' or 'Request' is active or selected within the Data Archiving settings.

task_completion.description: Verify that the archiving status is enabled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A toggle switch, checkbox, or radio button corresponding to the archiving status is set to 'Enable', 'On', or is checked.

task_completion.description: Verify the retention period criteria is set to 365 days for closed requests.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text box or numeric input field defining the age of closed requests to be archived contains the exact value '365'.

task_completion.description: Verify the configuration changes have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success or confirmation message (e.g., 'Settings saved successfully') is visible, or the final screenshot shows the settings (Requests, Enabled, 365 days) persisting after a save action.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to configure the settings.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show interaction with the ServiceDesk Plus web interface, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual ServiceDesk Plus application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The standard ManageEngine ServiceDesk Plus layout, menus, and branding should be visible, rather than a text editor or a generic mock webpage.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no screenshots of SQL clients, database prompts, or terminal windows executing database update commands.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target module for archiving must be exactly 'Request'. The archiving status must be enabled (true). The retention period criteria must be exactly 365 days.
